description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OpenDingux Release Build that triggers on published releases and workflow dispatches. The workflow should run on ubuntu-22.04 with concurrency control, cancelling any in-progress runs. For each of two jobs, gcw0 and lepus, check out the repository, install dependencies, set up toolchains, build the project with specific scripts, and upload artifacts to the release. Use actions to upload artifacts and update the release.
